findings.title: Detecting Safety Violations Across Many Agent Traces
findings.abstract: To identify safety violations, auditors often search over large sets of agent traces. This search is difficult because failures are often rare, complex, and sometimes even adversarially hidden and only detectable when multiple traces are analyzed together. findings.title: ClawGuard: A Runtime Security Framework for Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Against Indirect Prompt Injection

findings.title: GenTac: Generative Modeling and Forecasting of Soccer Tactics

findings.title: Shape-dependence of electrophoretic mobility

findings.title: $λ_A$: A Typed Lambda Calculus for LLM Agent Composition
findings.abstract: Existing LLM agent frameworks lack formal semantics: there is no principled way to determine whether an agent configuration is well-formed or will terminate. findings.title: Retrieval Is Not Enough: Why Organizational AI Needs Epistemic Infrastructure

findings.title: StarVLA-$α$: Reducing Complexity in Vision-Language-Action Systems

findings.abstract: We study parallel test-time scaling for long-horizon agentic tasks such as agentic search and deep research, where multiple rollouts are generated in parallel and aggregated into a final response. findings.title: DreamKG: A KG-Augmented Conversational System for People Experiencing Homelessness
findings.abstract: People experiencing homelessness (PEH) face substantial barriers to accessing timely, accurate information about community services.
